IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT BILLINGSLEY, BRAD RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT MATTHEWS, SHIRLEY $6,774.82 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,774.82, ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR. STATUTORY COSTS ARE AWARDED TO X-COMPLAINANT/DEFENDANT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF IS DENIED.
